MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-24-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DESIGNATE CASES AS RELATED AND TO ASSIGN CASE TO A SINGLE JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES OR TO DESIGNATE CASES AS COMPLEX WAS HEARD. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ASSIGN CASE TO A SINGLE JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES. PARTIES MAY AGREE TO THREE JUDGES AND SUBMIT THE LIST TO DEPT. 206 BY THE END OF THE DAY TOMORROW. ALL FUTURE HEARING DATES ARE VACATED. NOTICE OF THE SINGLY ASSIGNED JUDGE AND CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE DATE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
